name: Approval Workflow
description: Routes a SharePoint list item through a multi-stage approval process. First approver reviews, then a second approver confirms. The item status is updated based on the outcome.
key_features: Conditional branching based on approval outcome
SharePoint item status update on approval or rejection

flow_steps.action: Trigger: When an item is created or modified
flow_steps.description: Fires whenever an item in the SharePoint list changes.

flow_steps.action: Condition: Check if ApprovalStatus equals 'Pending Approval'
flow_steps.description: Only proceed if the item needs approval. Prevents re-processing already-approved items.

flow_steps.action: Start and wait for an approval (First Approver)
Condition: Check if first approval outcome equals 'Approve'
Start and wait for an approval (Second Approver)
Condition: Check if second approval outcome equals 'Approve'

flow_steps.description: Updates the ApprovalStatus and ApprovalComments columns based on the final outcome.

notes: Replace {{FIRST_APPROVER_EMAIL}} with the first approver's email.
Replace {{SECOND_APPROVER_EMAIL}} with the second approver's email.
Replace {{SHAREPOINT_SITE_URL}} and {{LIST_NAME}} with your SharePoint details.
To start the approval process, change an item's ApprovalStatus to 'Pending Approval'.
The Approvals connector requires a Power Automate Premium license.
